edited_history_id.description: Activity log ID from the last known edit. Used for conflict detection.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this data warehouse saved query.

name.description: Unique name for the view. Used as the table name in HogQL queries and the node name in the data modeling Node.

query.description: HogQL query definition as a JSON object with a "query" key containing the SQL string and a "kind" key containing the query type. Example: {"query": "SELECT * FROM events LIMIT 100", "kind": "HogQLQuery"}

soft_update.description: If true, skip column inference and validation. For saving drafts.
